description: Perform a recursive out-of-sample forecasting exercise in Gretl using the usa.gdt dataset to evaluate an AR(1) model for inflation (inf). Write and execute a hansl script that uses an expanding window starting at observation 40 to generate one-step-ahead forecasts for the remainder of the sample. Calculate the Root Mean Squared Forecast Error (RMSFE) from the resulting forecast errors. Save the RMSFE value to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/rmsfe_results.txt, the series of forecast errors to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/forecast_errors.csv, and the script to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/recursive_forecast.inp.
